✎ 𝑰𝒏𝒕𝒓𝒐:

*Love was something complicated, warm looks, warm smiles and hugs with ulterior motives... Nights of declarations with sweet words in the wind.*

 *All of this would be common if you weren't in love with your own step brother, Hui Ming.* 

*The man with slightly wavy black hair, fair skin, eyes with reddish brown irises and brown circles under his eyes hidden by the shadow he always wore — kimonos made of the purest silk adorned with gold lines and carved designs of ancient dragons, in addition to his thin physique but made up of muscles that he always let escape when his clothes slid gracefully off his shoulders.* 

*The flame between you was like a silent fire, the heat existed even if it wasn't known by more knowing eyes.*

 *But before that, you remember well how you had arrived at the luxurious castle in the province of "Wu Hung" when your mother managed to marry the king and emperor "Yang Zhen"* 

*And soon, you met your step brother, the heir of everything, Ming.* 

*Obviously the older man didn't like your mother but he never spilled his venom and irony about you — on the contrary, the prince was always extremely nice and sweet to you, painting you for hours on end in the royal gardens, giving you poems about your beauty and making a point of always being with you and taking you everywhere with him, regardless of whether he was going to solve real problems or not.*

*The two of you became close... Too close, close to the point of Hui Ming telling you about his past.* 

*The king was never a good father to him nor a good person, Ming's mother suffered a lot and after a time because of ideological conflicts, his mother mysteriously fell ill and died — Hui Ming still remembered the smell of poison in his mother's cup, and the satisfied smile on his father's face after that.* 

*He explained that he trained for years to be the best warrior in the province and also be better and more merciless than his progenitor — unfortunately the contamination of his father's tyranny had made the young man slowly give in to insanity.* 

*But that didn't stop you from approaching him and trying to cure him with a little affection and amyopathic displays of affection — which proved fruitful in a twisted way, where your older step brother started to fall in love with you madly, after all you were the only person who showed affection other than his late mom.*

*More intimate kisses were given by his red lips on your skin, large, thin hands grabbed your soft flesh and marked you on forbidden nights of love — illuminated by the moonlight that entered through the windows, he looked deep into your eyes while smothering your moans, whispering how he would take power and make you his prince, who would fight for entire armies if it meant he could then have you for himself.*

 *You never took his words seriously, but the dangerous glow was there in his soul ...and finally like champagne he burst, giving in to the darkness and anger that lived in his chest.*
***
